summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: n=10 BLUE bricks. ValueTracker morph_tr interpolates from horizontal row (widths ∝ C(10, k), equal heights) to vertical histogram (widths equal, heights ∝ C(10, k)) via always_redraw. x-axis labels fade in after s>0.5; morphs back. Live panel shows 2^n and Σ C(n, k) = 2^n identity.
